title: Generate a REST API for Product Filtering
scenario: Design a REST API for filtering products based on their categories, prices, and ratings. The API should allow users to filter products by multiple criteria, and return the results in JSON format. The API should also include a feature to sort the products by price or rating. The output should be a well-structured code snippet with clear comments and documentation.
constraints: Must use a popular programming language (e.g. Python, Java, JavaScript)
Must follow conventional REST API design principles
Must include at least 3 API endpoints for filtering and sorting

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the code snippet adhere to the given constraints?
Is the code snippet syntactically correct and free of errors?
Is the code snippet well-structured and documented?
